title: Bank of America Corporation (BAC) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value analysis of Bank of America Corporation using a discounted cash flow (DCF) model and sensitivity analysis.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 7.2% - Benefiting from higher net interest yields. Standard Free Cash Flow metrics are not applicable to commercial banking institutions. A traditional DCF model is therefore unworkable.
